coverage_note: The bundled SST population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from SST rare-variant mechanisms, unexpected pathway crosstalk, sensory perception, mitochondrial stress, neuroimmune signaling, epithelial defense, and metabolic edge cases and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000157005: SST coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: SST findings should be read against rare-variant mechanisms, unexpected pathway crosstalk, sensory perception, mitochondrial stress, neuroimmune signaling, epithelial defense, and metabolic edge cases; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

SST surprising-impact variation model is curated as a SST marker for Obscure or underappreciated genes with surprising phenotype impact, Rare disease, trait modifier, sensory, metabolic, immune, digestive, and neurobehavioral pathway review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

SST regulatory expression context model is curated as a SST marker for Obscure or underappreciated genes with surprising phenotype impact, Rare disease, trait modifier, sensory, metabolic, immune, digestive, and neurobehavioral pathway review; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
